title: Better Light Weight
description: Better Minecraft but with less Mods(Made for bad computer)(Like MAC)
body:
This ModPack is made for People that has a bad computer like Mac to play a Modpack with many Places to Adventure and build.\
This Modpack allows Them to play Better MC like Modpack but light weight.\
Some Core Mods:\
Sodium\
Create\
Farmer's Deligth\
Botanuim\
Iris\
Ad Astra\
RPG Series\
Better Nether\
Better End
